message:
fix(test): fix 58 test compilation errors from workflow module extraction

- Fix BackpressureMonitor → BackpressureManager (correct type name) in inline tests
- Fix MemoryPressureTier::Normal → Green (correct variant name) in scrollback_eviction tests
- Fix repro_dedup_bug.rs imports: use crate::patterns::{PatternEngine, DetectionContext}
- Add pub(crate) visibility to extracted workflow functions/structs needed by tests:
  coordination.rs (infer_agent_from_title, truncate_snippet, TextScanPatterns, scan_file_text)
  engine.rs (redact_text_for_log)
  handlers.rs (AUTH_COOLDOWN_MS, AuthCassHintsLookup + fields, cooldown_ms fields,
    classify_limit, build_recovery_plan, classify_quota, record_from_detection,
    normalized_cass_query, build_recovery_prompt)
  builtin_workflows.rs (resolve_prompt, check_pane_guards)
  runner.rs (engine field)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
